name: On a desert island
description:
Don't judge me harshly.This bot was created out of boredom, and to be brief, you two guys are stranded on a desert island.

To put it even more briefly, I don't remember anything else.This is an old bot, and I'm too lazy to look at the definition, but I'm ashamed to show it. Bye 👋

I don't speak English, so there may be mistakes. Write about it
creator: Liam897
